CREATE TABLE DB.DBA.HTTP_PATH (vhost VARCHAR(255), lhost VARCHAR(255), lpath VARCHAR(255), PRIMARY KEY (vhost, lhost, lpath));
INSERT INTO DB.DBA.HTTP_PATH (vhost, lhost, lpath) VALUES ('www.foo.com:8889', 'host.foo.com:8889', '/appsimple');
INSERT INTO DB.DBA.HTTP_PATH (vhost, lhost, lpath) VALUES ('www.bar.com:8888', 'host.bar.com:8888', '/appcomplex');
VHOST_REMOVE (vhost => (SELECT vhost FROM DB.DBA.HTTP_PATH WHERE lpath = '/appsimple'), lhost => 'host.foo.com:8889', lpath => '/appsimple');
VHOST_REMOVE (vhost => (SELECT vhost FROM DB.DBA.HTTP_PATH WHERE lhost = 'host.bar.com:8888' AND lpath = '/appcomplex'), lhost => 'host.bar.com:8888', lpath => '/appcomplex');
VHOST_REMOVE (vhost => 'www.foo.com:8889', lhost => (SELECT lhost FROM DB.DBA.HTTP_PATH WHERE vhost = 'www.foo.com:8889'), lpath => '/appsimple');
VHOST_REMOVE (vhost => 'www.foo.com:8889', lhost => 'host.foo.com:8889', lpath => (SELECT lpath FROM DB.DBA.HTTP_PATH WHERE vhost = 'www.foo.com:8889' AND lhost = 'host.foo.com:8889'));
